source_reference: RimWorld active session with local Git-backed CombatExtended checkout
result: Active load order Harmony/Core/CE/Zombieland/RimBridgeServer loaded CE from Mods/CombatExtended version 16.7.2.0 with no config issues; all four Zombieland CE patch targets resolved; ce-compat, tanky damage-stack, and active-electrifier bullet-absorption smokes passed; warning-or-higher logs were empty.

source_reference: RimWorld active session with Zombieland disabled
result: Temporary load order Harmony/Core/RimBridgeServer matched the output save metadata; Zombieland packages were inactive; the no-ZL copy loaded visual-ready, advanced 30 ticks, and warning-or-higher logs were empty.
limitations: Does not retest remover generation; it proves the already-generated no-ZL copy can load and tick without Zombieland. Original ModsConfig was restored afterward.
notes: Closes the prior optional/manual no-Zombieland load strengthening for S-Uninstall-Hygiene.

result: Remaining debug/overlay tail was rechecked against RimWorld 1.6 and 1.4: SelectionDrawer.DrawSelectionOverlays is unchanged; MapInterface.MapInterfaceUpdate and MapInterfaceOnGUI_AfterMainTabs retain signatures with updated DrawingMap guards and same draw phases; EditWindow_DebugInspector.CurrentDebugString still returns string under LudeonTK.
limitations: Runtime visual evidence intentionally not claimed because these are debug/inspector surfaces, not supported player-facing scenarios.
notes: Adds evidence that the exact generated-name tail is classification/governance work rather than an active behavior backlog.

result: Bridge summary reports 175 Tool attributes: 24 generic primitives, 8 scenario fixtures, 140 narrow contracts, 0 evidence helpers, and 3 optional integrations; largest narrow families are Contamination 43, FogAndIncidents 23, SpecialZombies 16, CorpsesAndAvoidance 13, and Environment 12; candidate_retire evidence-helper count is 0.
limitations: Summary is governance evidence only; it does not prove individual gameplay behavior.
notes: Use before full --bridge-tools when deciding whether to add, retire, or fold bridge endpoints.

result: RimWorld 1.4/1.6 comparison found GenClamor still has four DoClamor overloads; Pawn_RecordsTracker.RecordsTick became RecordsTickInterval(int delta) but both wrappers call unchanged RecordsTickUpdate(80); AddTo/Increment signatures stayed stable with only log-string formatting changes; FriendlyFireBlastRadiusTargetScoreOffset and FriendlyFireConeTargetScoreOffset signatures and bodies are unchanged and retain GetThingList insertion points.
limitations: No runtime rerun was needed because existing runtime evidence already covers these branches; this pass only guards against hidden 1.6 sibling/rename drift.
notes: Supports NEG.1_6.DISCOVERY by proving this brittle multi-target core/hostility slice does not add a new unrepresented 1.6 obligation.

result: RimWorld 1.6 JobDriver_PlantWork.MakeNewToils uses tickIntervalAction and now creates additional harvest-yield products through a second ThingMaker.MakeThing call; Zombieland replaced the old single-call transpiler with a scoped harvest-plant ThingMaker context. Runtime regression harvested real rice from plant contamination 0.64 into RawRice x6 at contamination 0.256 with plantTransfer 0.4 and warning-or-higher logs empty.
limitations: Core data did not expose a plant comp with non-empty additional harvest yield, so the new branch is static/decompiler-backed and should be sampled when a loaded def/mod provides additional harvest yield. ModsConfig was restored to the prior CE-enabled load order afterward.
notes: Prevents a silent 1.6 product-tail gap in plant harvest without adding a one-off bridge contract.
